Title: Dohme, Robert
Overview: Early exponent of the Baroque as an area of study in art history. Dohme was among the first group of art historians to consider the Baroque an area worthy of art historical study, including Cornelius Gurlitt, Heinrich Wölfflin, Albert Brinckmann, August Schmarsow, Aloïs Riegl, and Adolf Feulner.
Sources: Metzler Kunsthistoriker Lexikon. Stuttgart: J. B. Metzler, 1999, pp. 61-62.
